_comment: Single source of truth for large assets that live on Google Drive instead of Git. scripts/build_release_bundles.py PRODUCES these zips (and fills size_bytes + sha256). scripts/download_assets.py CONSUMES this file to fetch, verify, and extract them. After you upload a zip to Google Drive, paste its share link into the matching 'gdrive_url' field below (use the 'anyone with the link' sharing setting).

bundles.title: Core datasets (PIO + external Roboflow)
bundles.notes: Primary source data, NOT regenerable. Required for every pipeline step. External datasets can alternatively be re-pulled with src/download_roboflow_datasets.py.

bundles.title: Trained YOLO weights + training runs
bundles.notes: All YOLO training runs and best/last checkpoints (runs_compare, runs_rectified, runs_pad015, runs_radial, runs_pio) plus base .pt weights. Required to reproduce evaluation without retraining. The local Python venv inside this folder is excluded.

bundles.title: MOWA rectification model + MobileSAM
bundles.notes: Vendored MOWA repo including checkpoint/mowa_pretrained.pth, plus MobileSAM weights for mask-guided rectification. MOWA is under the S-Lab License 1.0 (non-commercial) - see THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md. Alternative: git clone https://github.com/KangLiao929/MOWA and download the checkpoint from the id in docs/DATA_SETUP.md.

bundles.title: Derived data (rectified / enhanced / augmented / masks)
bundles.notes: Regenerable outputs of the MOWA / enhancement / augmentation stages. Download only to skip recomputation; otherwise regenerate with the src/ scripts documented in the README.

bundles.title: Extracted bbox features + weight estimates
bundles.notes: Large intermediate CSVs (bbox_features, weight_estimates*, ensemble). Regenerable via src/extract_bbox_features.py and src/estimate_weight_anomalies.py.

bundles.title: Reference papers (PDF)
bundles.notes: Third-party reference literature for the methodology. Provided for convenience; copyright belongs to the respective publishers.

bundles.title: Curated rectified-PIO release (prebuilt)
bundles.notes: Standalone share package of the best MOWA-rectified PIO variant (images + labels + data.yaml). Already zipped at the repo root; the builder only hashes it. Extracts to rilis_rectified_pio/.
